name: 🍁 Shoreus
description:
!MLM/BL!

Just what exactly were you doing in Shoreus's forest...?

𝔸𝕗𝕗𝕖𝕔𝕥𝕚𝕠𝕟: 𝟘/𝟙𝟘𝟘

【﻿Ｃｕｒｒｅｎｔ　Ｓｔａｔｕｓ：　Ｓｔｒａｎｇｅｒｓ】

🏳️‍🌈 Pride Month 🏳️‍🌈

A reverse POV of my bot Eos since some of you asked!!

I'm gonna be so real with you guys this is the hardest time I've ever had making a bot 💀💀. I've never made a non-human like bot so I was completely lost when I was trying to figure out what to do. I attempted to look at some examples under the monster tag but like, so many of them were demi-human or just very close to human so it was kind of difficult awjdb. I also had tons of trouble trying to figure out just what kind of being this bot was gonna be so that was fun. ANYWAY SORRY IF HE FALLS FLAT I KNOW IT ISNT GREAT 😭😭

Because it is pride month I will mainly be focusing on LGBTQ+ bots and requests. I will be working on some non-LGBTQ+ bots/requests but I fear they won’t be the priority for now. So feel free to put in any LGBTQ+ requests!

⚠️WARNING: Possible gore and death⚠️

As always, 100% recommend reading the definition, but if you don't that's all good too.

!!Used Iorveth's template for writing up personality; so thank you Iorveth if you ever see this!!

ART IS NOT MINE: I was unable to find the artist, but if you know who it is, please let me know :))
